assessorQuestions: ¿Cuál es tu nombre completo y de dónde eres?
¿Qué hace que tu país sea un destino turístico atractivo?
¿Qué sueles hacer para conocer gente nueva?
¿Cuáles son tus planes para el próximo año académico?
¿Cómo manejas situaciones de estrés en el trabajo?
¿Por qué es importante la sostenibilidad en la hostelería moderna?

data.sloganCompletion: el auténtico lujo del Mediterráneo andaluz

furniture: a private furnished terrace with sun loungers
featuredRoom.bathroomFeature: an outdoor rainfall shower surrounded by lush gardens

data.targetAudience: Luxury travellers, wellness seekers and international celebrities
guestQuestions: ¿El hotel tiene restaurante con estrella Michelin?
¿Podemos organizar una boda en el hotel?
checklist: Use the 'dejarse sorprender por' slogan formula
Present the featured room with all details (furniture + bathroom)
Mention the shuttle service and price
Present the extra facility with hours and pricing
Answer ALL guest questions — include at least one NO answer

data.complaintScenario: A guest arrives at the restaurant for breakfast 20 minutes before the 10:30 closing time but is told by a waiter that the buffet is already being cleared. The guest is upset because they had a late wake-up call due to a hotel error.
data.problemDetails: The hotel's automated wake-up call system failed — the guest received their call 45 minutes late. They are now missing breakfast despite it being included in their room rate.
resolutionOptions: Apologise sincerely for the wake-up call failure and the breakfast situation
Arrange for a fresh breakfast to be served in the restaurant or sent to the room
Offer a complimentary breakfast on their final day
Credit the cost of breakfast to their room account
Escalate to the duty manager and ensure the guest is compensated appropriately
checklist: Greet and listen to the guest calmly — let them explain
Apologise sincerely using formal usted register
Take ownership of the hotel's error (wake-up call failure)
Offer a concrete and immediate solution (fresh breakfast)
Offer additional compensation for the inconvenience
Confirm the guest is satisfied before they leave
Promise to investigate the wake-up call system failure
